creator: mmoll@freebsd.org
text:
# cd /usr/ports/audio/pulseaudio
# make
[...]
checking for LIBSNDFILE... no
configure: error: Package requirements ( sndfile >= 1.0.20 ) were not met:
[...]

Fix: 

# cd /usr/ports/audio/libsndfile
# make install
# cd /usr/ports/audio/pulseaudio
# make
How-To-Repeat: # cd /usr/ports/audio/pulseaudio
# make
